name: wp-proud-admin
description: Administration theme, permissions tweaks, and ProudCity settings pages. [ProudCity](http://proudcity.com) is a Wordpress platform for modern, standards-compliant municipal websites.

scripts.projectsetup: npm install && rm -rf node_modules/proudcity-patterns && git clone git@github.com:proudcity/proudcity-patterns.git node_modules/proudcity-patterns && npm run patch-patterns
scripts.projectupdate: rm -rf node_modules/proudcity-patterns && git clone git@github.com:proudcity/proudcity-patterns.git node_modules/proudcity-patterns && npm run patch-patterns
scripts.patch-patterns: sed -i 's|bower_components/font-awesome/scss|node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/scss|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/mixins/_font-awesome.scss node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/loaders/_font-awesome-loader.scss && sed -i 's|floor(($grid-gutter-width / 2))|floor($grid-gutter-width * 0.5)|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/_local-variables.scss && sed -i 's|(($navbar-height - $line-height-computed) / 2)|(($navbar-height - $line-height-computed) * 0.5)|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/_local-variables.scss && sed -i 's|$line-height-computed / 4|$line-height-computed * 0.25|g; s|$line-height-computed / 2|$line-height-computed * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/helpers/_utilities.scss && sed -i 's|percentage(((1 / $grid-columns) / 2))|calc(50% / #{$grid-columns})|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/helpers/_grid.scss && sed -i 's|($nav-height-short - $button-height) / 2 - 1|($nav-height-short - $button-height) * 0.5 - 1|g; s|($nav-height-short - $nav-height-mod - $button-height) / 2|($nav-height-short - $nav-height-mod - $button-height) * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/_navbar.scss && sed -i 's|$grid-gutter-width / 2|$grid-gutter-width * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/_social-wall.scss && sed -i 's|114px/22px\*$proudbar-logo-height|$proudbar-logo-height * 5.18182|g; s|($proudbar-line-height - $proudbar-logo-height) / 2|($proudbar-line-height - $proudbar-logo-height) * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/_proudbar.scss && sed -i 's|$line-height-computed / 2|$line-height-computed * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/_page-header.scss && sed -i 's|$card-spacer-y / 2|$card-spacer-y * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/vendor/_card.scss && sed -i 's|$button-height / 2|$button-height * 0.5|g; s|$bar-thickness / 2|$bar-thickness * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/vendor/_hamburger.scss && sed -i 's|$grid-gutter-width/2|$grid-gutter-width * 0.5|g' node_modules/proudcity-patterns/app/pattern-scss/wp/_so-pagebuilder.scss
